whats_new: Bill Checker: set up GST and other recurring charges once with Manage Labels — they appear on every new bill automatically
Bill Checker: adjustments now split into before-taxable (e.g. discount) and after-taxable (e.g. CGST/SGST), so tax is calculated on the right amount
Weaver bills only show the columns the chosen rate method needs, and the rate fills in automatically for the paisa × picks method
Search weaver and dyeing-unit dropdowns by typing
Save a bill with Ctrl+S, and answer the PDF prompt with Y or N
